paper_metadata.subject_name: Promotion Management and B 2 B Marketing

subparts.text: What do you understand by B2B marketing. 2.5
Differentiate between B2B and B2C marketing with examples. 2.5
What is segmentation in B2B markets? Provide examples. 2.5
Define “Weaving marketing into the fabric of the firm.” 2.5
Explain the role of sales promotion in the overall promotional mix. 2.5
What are the limitations of using sales promotion as a primary marketing tool? 2.5
What do you mean by integrated promotion? 2.5
State any two online sales promotion techniques. 2.5

questions.question_text: Critically evaluate the nature and scope of B2B marketing in today’s globalized economy.
Discuss the key stages of the organizational buying process and Emerging paradigms of B2B marketing.
A telecom enterprise uses trade shows, advertising, and PR to attract large corporate clients. Evaluate its IMC strategy and suggest improvements.
Discuss the key components of an integrated B2B communication strategy and their respective roles.
Discuss the significance and types of sales promotions in modern business.
An FMCG brand frequently rotates sales promotions throughout the year. Examine the potential benefits and pitfalls of this strategy on consumer perception and profitability.
What is outsourcing? Discuss the advantages and challenges of outsourcing sales promotion activities.
A national beverage company is launching a festive season promotional campaign. Create a plan involving salesmen, dealers, and online promotion.
